title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Births, Deaths and Marriages Registration Act, 1886; and (2) It shall come into force on such day1as the Central Government, by notification in the Official Gazette, directs. 2* * * * *
footnote: 1. The 1st October, 1888, see Gazette of India, 1888, Part I, p. 336. 2. Sub-section (3) rep. by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and the First Schedule.
